description_long: This is a robust urban fence constructed primarily from vertical wooden panels framed by thick brick columns and a brick base. The fence features a repeating pattern of rectangular wooden sections, each topped with a narrow lattice of crisscrossed metal or wood for added security and visual interest. The brick columns are evenly spaced and capped with flat tops, providing structural support and a classic aesthetic. A single wooden gate with a metal handle is integrated into one end of the fence, allowing controlled access. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for residential or commercial property boundaries. The materials and build suggest durability and resistance to weather and intrusion.
description: A sturdy fence with wooden panels, brick columns, and a lattice top, featuring a single wooden gate. The design is both secure and decorative, ideal for urban boundaries.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the fence with brick columns, wooden panels, and lattice top, no gate visible.
description_view_1: Side/top-down view highlighting the thickness of the brick columns and the depth of the fence, with part of the gate visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inside of the fence, the gate is clearly visible at the right end.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the gate and the adjoining brick column, showing the entry point.
